disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Progressive difficulty starting the stream, weak intermittent flow, terminal dribbling and a sensation of incomplete emptying, worsening acutely over three days
trigger_question_examples: Tell me what your urine stream has been like.
Do you feel like you empty fully when you go?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I have to wait and strain to get it started, the flow is weak and stops and starts, and when I finish it dribbles and still feels like there's more in there.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Nocturia up to eight to ten times per night with profound sleep deprivation and daytime exhaustion
trigger_question_examples: How many times are you getting up at night to pass urine?
How is this affecting your sleep?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm up eight, nine, ten times a night and I'm absolutely shattered during the day.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recently started an over-the-counter cold-and-flu decongestant preparation a few days before the acute worsening
trigger_question_examples: Have you started any new medications, including anything over the counter?
Are you taking anything for a cold or blocked nose?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I did start a cold and flu tablet from the chemist a few days ago for a stuffy nose — could that be doing this?

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Still able to pass small volumes of urine — has not become completely unable to void
trigger_question_examples: Are you still able to pass at least some urine?
Have you had any period where you could not pass anything at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can still get a little bit out if I strain, it's just a few drops and it takes ages — I haven't been completely blocked up yet.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden compelling urgency occasionally resulting in leakage before reaching the toilet
trigger_question_examples: Do you ever get a sudden urge you can't hold?
Have you had any leaking or accidents?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah, sometimes it comes on so suddenly I nearly don't make it and I've leaked a bit before getting there.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever, chills, rigors or burning pain on passing urine
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any fevers, chills or shakes?
Does it burn or sting when you pass urine?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fevers or shakes, and it doesn't burn — it's more that I just can't get it going properly.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe sleep deprivation combined with urgent nocturnal toileting over trip-hazard rugs, with the patient exhausted and rushing in the dark
trigger_question_examples: How are you managing getting to the bathroom at night?
Is there anything at home making this harder or riskier?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm rushing in the dark half-asleep and there are rugs everywhere between the bed and the bathroom — I keep nearly going over.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No blood seen in the urine
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any blood in your urine?
What colour has your urine been?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I haven't seen any blood — it just comes out slowly and in small amounts.
